supporting.prompt: Photographic close-up of a high-end hair salon reception counter, warm cream/beige tones with brushed-brass accents and a black detail line, soft late-afternoon daylight from a tall window with linen curtains. On the marble-topped counter: a pair of polished stainless-steel hairdressing scissors resting on a folded white linen hand-towel, a small clear glass vase with a single eucalyptus sprig, a matte-black smartphone propped at an angle against a small ceramic espresso cup (no readable screen content, just soft warm wallpaper glow), an open paper appointment book with handwritten pencil scheduling lines (no readable text), and a small amber-glass perfume bottle. Background slightly blurred: a styled salon mirror with brass frame and dried flower stems. No people, no faces, no logos, no readable text, no UI on the smartphone screen. Photographic realism, modern-luxe atmosphere, warm muted palette (cream, brass, walnut, off-white).
